problem.note: EXPECTED_GIT_SHA CF worker secret tracked repo HEAD after www-only commits; platform Railway still on e0bb318.

root_cause: infra/nf-probe-cron EXPECTED_GIT_SHA secret set to git HEAD instead of live platform.noetfield.com git_sha

immediate_unblock.command: LIVE=$(curl -sS https://platform.noetfield.com/api/public/chat/health | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['git_sha'])"); cd infra/nf-probe-cron && printf '%s' "$LIVE" | wrangler secret put EXPECTED_GIT_SHA && wrangler deploy
immediate_unblock.requires: Cloudflare wrangler auth (Mac vault or CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN)

durable_fix.apply: cd Noetfield && git checkout -b cursor/nf-probe-drift-align-72f6 && git am /path/to/noetfeld-os/receipts/proof/noetfield-probe-drift-fix-patches/*.patch && git push -u origin cursor/nf-probe-drift-align-72f6
durable_fix.post_merge: Actions → NF probe sync expected SHA → Run workflow (or bash scripts/sync_nf_probe_expected_sha.sh on Mac)

cloud_agent_blocker: cursor[bot] lacks push access to Noetfield-Systems/Noetfield (403)
